PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen | Where-Object { $_.LocalPort -in 3000,3001,3100,4000,8000,8002,8080,8888,5173,9000 } | Select-Object LocalAddress,LocalPort,OwningProcess | Sort-Object LocalPort -Unique | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen | Where-Object { $_.LocalAddress -in '0.0.0.0','127.0.0.1','::' -and $_.LocalPort -gt 1024 -and $_.LocalPort -lt 20000 } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty LocalPort -Unique | Sort-Object)
PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen | Where-Object { $_.LocalPort -gt 1024 -and $_.LocalPort -lt 20000 } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty LocalPort -Unique | Sort-Object)
